hooks.command:
node -e "const cmd = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')).tool_input?.command ?? ''; if (/--no-verify/.test(cmd) || / git commit [^|&
]*\s+-n /.test(cmd)) { process.stderr.write('
[brain:hook] BLOCKED: --no-verify / git commit -n bypasses governance hooks.
See ADR-0014 §9. Fix the hook that is causing the false-positive instead.
'); process.exit(2); }"
